# CopilotRevive Skills Index

These skills were extracted from the reusable migration cookbooks in `CopilotRevive/cookbooks`.

## ⚠️ Obligatory Skills (auto-loaded, always applied)

These skills carry the `obligatory_` prefix and are **always enforced** during migration. They are
materialised on disk by running:

```bash
bash .specify/scripts/bash/setup-obligatory-skills.sh
```

| Skill | Source Cookbook | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `obligatory_ai-generated-comment` | `cookbooks/ai-generated-comment-guideline.md` | Add `generated by AI in Github cloud` comment to every new file and class |
| `obligatory_mermaid-architecture-documentation` | `cookbooks/mermaid-architecture-documentation-guideline.md` | Require Mermaid diagrams in all architecture documentation |
| `obligatory_java-to-python-migration-practices` | `cookbooks/java-to-python-migration-good-code-practices.md` | Enforce good code practices during Java → Python migration |
